codeReview.summary: The database, persistence, and migration posture packet (docs/platform/db-migration.md, 323 lines) is thorough, well-structured, and factually accurate. All claims verified against the actual codebase: 62 v2 migrations (V1–V172), 158 legacy migrations (V1–V165), ddl-auto=none, flyway_schema_history_v2 history table, flyway-v2 profile activation via Spring profile groups, benchmark profile pointing at legacy track with clean-disabled=false, H2 openapi profile with Flyway disabled, and all four import endpoints confirmed at their documented paths. Cross-references to ADR-005, runbooks, ARCHITECTURE.md, RELIABILITY.md, R2-CHECKPOINT.md, and core-idempotency.md all resolve to existing files. INDEX.md and MODULE-INVENTORY.md were updated with correct links. Freshness marker (Last reviewed: 2026-03-30) is present.

summary: PASS — the db-migration packet comprehensively documents persistence technology, schema areas, entity/repository conventions, Flyway v2 migration posture, profile activation, legacy-track constraints, and data-import entry surfaces. All factual claims verified against source code and configuration. Cross-references resolve correctly. Discoverability via INDEX.md and MODULE-INVENTORY.md confirmed. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
